title: Project Cost & Portfolio Analytics
description: Track project schedule variance, cost overruns, subcontractor performance, and property portfolio health across active developments.
prerequisites: Azure AD account with Fabric workspace creation permissions

layers: Bronze (Raw Projects, Tasks, Subcontractors, Cost Ledger)

sampleData.description: 200 construction projects with type, region, budget, planned/actual dates
10,000 project tasks with planned/actual dates and completion status
50,000 cost entries with category, supplier, planned vs actual spend
100 subcontractors with trade, rating, and contract history

fabricItems.name: construction_lakehouse
fabricItems.description: Central lakehouse for all construction analytics data

fabricItems.name: 01_bronze_ingest
fabricItems.description: Ingest raw CSV files into Bronze Delta tables

fabricItems.name: 02_silver_transform
fabricItems.description: Clean data, derive schedule variance, cost variance, and completion rates

fabricItems.name: 03_gold_aggregate
fabricItems.description: 6 Gold tables: project summary, cost analysis, subcontractor performance, weekly trends, overrun alerts, portfolio scorecards

fabricItems.name: 04_reporting_views
fabricItems.description: SQL views: executive summary, cost overruns, schedule risk, subcontractor scorecard

fabricItems.name: 05_dashboard
fabricItems.description: Interactive HTML dashboard with KPI cards, overrun heat-map, and portfolio comparison

fabricItems.name: construction_analytics_model
fabricItems.description: Direct Lake model with schedule, cost, and portfolio performance measures

fabricItems.name: Project Cost Dashboard
fabricItems.description: 3-page dashboard: Project Overview, Cost Analysis, Subcontractor Performance

fabricItems.name: daily_construction_pipeline
fabricItems.description: Orchestrates all notebooks sequentially with retry
